title: Multi-fit Telescopic Adjustable Bottle Trap - 40mm (1.1/2') Basin Waste Sink Waste Kit, Sink Waste, Multi-Fit, Manufactured to EN2574-1, 75mm Water Seal
features: 40mm Universal Telescopic Adjustable Bottle Trap: This sink trap is a multi-fit, adjustable, and telescopic bottle trap perfect for a kitchen sink waste kit. Enhance your sink's plumbing parts with a reliable solution for managing bathroom and kitchen sink waste.

Standards Compliance: Our sink waste trap is manufactured to EN2574-1, ensuring that it meets stringent quality and safety standards, making it a reliable addition to your Belfast sink waste management system.

Suitable for 40mm waste pipe: This versatile trap is designed to work seamlessly with a 40mm waste pipe, making it an ideal choice for sink pipe fittings. It's also compatible with kitchen sink waste fittings, simplifying your plumbing tasks.

75mm Water Seal: Benefit from a 75mm water seal, enhancing the functionality of your kitchen sink waste or 40mm flexible waste pipe. This helps prevent unpleasant odours from rising up through the sink waste fittings.

Versatile Use: Whether you need a basin waste trap, sink waste pipe solution, or a bottle trap, this product covers all bases. It's adjustable to suit a variety of sink types, offering a practical solution for all your plumbing needs.
description: Introducing the 1.1/2 inch or 40mm Universal Telescopic Adjustable Bottle Trap, a superior 40mm sink waste solution. This high-performance sink waste kit is engineered to provide an efficient and reliable solution for your sink waste management. It is designed specifically with a 40mm waste pipe fitting, making it a perfect match for your kitchen or bathroom sink. The Universal Telescopic Adjustable Bottle Trap features a basin waste seal kit, ensuring a tight and secure connection with your sink waste pipe. The basin waste trap prevents unpleasant odours from rising up from your drainage system, maintaining a fresh and clean environment in your kitchen or bathroom. Its 40mm waste pipe fittings are compatible with most sink plumbing parts, offering a versatile solution for your home. This product comes with a 40mm flexible waste pipe and sink waste fittings, which make installation a breeze. Whether you're replacing a Belfast sink waste, a kitchen sink waste kit, or bathroom sink waste, this product is an excellent choice. The Universal Telescopic Adjustable Bottle Trap is a sophisticated and practical alternative to the traditional P Trap. Its telescopic design allows for easy adjustment to fit your sink's unique specifications. The trap is a crucial part of sink pipe fittings, and this product's design ensures a secure fit with your sink's U bend and under sink pipe fittings. Our product boasts a 75mm water seal, in accordance with EN2574-1 manufacturing standards. This feature enhances the product's ability to prevent leaks and maintain a strong seal within your sink waste pipe. The bottle trap is a multi-fit solution, designed to accommodate a variety of sink waste kits, including kitchen sink waste fittings, sink waste traps, and basin sink waste solutions. It is a viable replacement for McAlpine basin traps, mcalpine bottle traps, and other sink traps. In addition to being a practical solution, the Universal Telescopic Adjustable Bottle Trap adds a clean, streamlined look to your kitchen or bathroom. Its sleek design complements your sink's aesthetics, making it a stylish addition to your home. Whether you're updating your kitchen sink waste trap, replacing your bathroom sink waste, or installing a new sink, the Universal Telescopic Adjustable Bottle Trap is an excellent investment. Its robust design, practical features, and stylish aesthetics make it a superior choice for your 40mm sink waste needs.
